name: Spaghettini with Dried Ttomatoes & Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix lemon peel, vegetable bouillon and 1-1/2 cups hot water; set aside.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, heat olive oil in hot oven. Cook garlic, stirring occasionally, until golden brown. Remove and discard garlic using a slotted spoon.
3. In the hot oil, cook zucchini with pepper and 1 tablespoon salt until zucchini is golden brown and tender-crisp.
4. Into the zucchini, stir vegetable bouillon mixture, dried tomatoes, and spaghettini; heat through, tossing to coat well.
